title: SSNI-834 I Was Stranded With My S*****t During A Sudden Rainstorm, So We Warmed Our Drenched Bodies And Engaged In Sweaty Fucking Sex, Over And Over Again, That Stormy Night Hiyori Yoshioka I Was Stranded With My S*****t During A Sudden Rainstorm, So We W
description: The sudden rain continued to fall heavily with lightning, and transportation was paralyzed. The girl student left behind in the school couldn't go home and stood still, "Would you like to come to my house for the time being?" It was supposed to be kindness, but now that is an excuse. Upon arriving at our house, the schoolgirl takes off her wet uniform and hits the stove in her underwear. When her room was filled with the young, fresh and lustrous scent of her wet in the rain and shivering in the cold, she hugged her and layered her skin on top of each other.
